item.name:
List all available event categories.

This endpoint returns the full list of categories that can be used
when creating or filtering events.

response.name: Success

item.name: Event Draft
item.description:
Event draft management (multi-step creation and publication).

All routes of this controller require an authenticated user (auth:api).

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of all non-published event drafts
belonging to the authenticated user.
Returns details of a specific draft belonging to the authenticated user.
Deletes the draft and its associated media.

formdata.description: optional Existing draft ID to update.

request.description:
Entry point for creating or updating an event draft. Saves
the basic event information and optional cover image.

response.name: Updated draft

item.name: Create event - step 2 (location, country, currency and dates).

request.description:
Saves location information, country, currency, and one or more
event occurrences (start/end dates).

item.name: Create event - step 3 (tickets / pricing / free event).

request.description:
Defines tickets and pricing for the event. Currency was already
chosen at step 2 and is reused here.

Finalizes the draft and creates the real Event with its occurrences
and ticket types. All previous steps must be completed.

item.name: Events
item.description: Public and organizer endpoints for listing and viewing events.

query.description: Search term applied to title, description, city and address.
Optional list of statuses to filter events (saved, upcoming, completed, cancelled).

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of public events with filters for search,
categories, country, status and sorting.

Returns the public details of an event identified by its numeric ID
or slug, including its occurrences and ticket types.

query.description: Search term applied to title, description, city and address.
Optional list of statuses (saved, upcoming, completed, cancelled).

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of events belonging to the authenticated
organizer, with optional filters on status and search term.

query.description: Search term applied to title, description, city and address.
Optional list of statuses (saved, upcoming, completed, cancelled).

request.description:
Returns a paginated list of events belonging to the authenticated
organizer, with optional filters on status and search term.

item.name: Get details of one of the current user's events.

request.description: Returns full details of an event owned by the authenticated organizer.

item.name: User authentication
item.description: Vérification de l'email (liens signés) et renvoi de lien.

request.description:
Marque l'email comme vérifié à partir d'un lien signé (middleware `signed` sur la route).
Optionnel: redirige vers le frontend si `FRONTEND_URL` est défini.

Endpoint backend appelé depuis l'email; redirige vers le frontend si `FRONTEND_URL` est défini.
Sinon retourne JSON `{ token, email }`.

response.body: Redirecting to http://localhost:3000/reset-password?token=abc123&email=user%40example.com.

request.description:
Body minimal : email + password. Champs optionnels : first_name, last_name, etc.
Après inscription, un email de vérification est envoyé.
Body : email + password uniquement.

item.name: Exchange a login_ticket (one-time) for an access token.

request.description: Utilisé après clic sur le lien de vérification d'email depuis le frontend.
Renvoie un email de vérification si l'utilisateur est authentifié et non vérifié.
Envoie un email avec un lien de réinitialisation.

response.body: { "message": "We have emailed your password reset link." }

request.description: Applique le nouveau mot de passe à partir du token.
Returns the authenticated user's information associated with the Bearer token.
